mapper.select:
SELECT q.id, q.title, q.content, q.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, q.course_id, c.title AS course_name, q.view_count, q.answer_count, q.create_time, q.last_answer_time FROM questions q LEFT JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courses c ON q.course_id = c.id
AND (q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND q.course_id = #{courseId}
ORDER BY q.create_time DESC

SELECT q.id, q.title, q.content, q.user_id, q.course_id, q.view_count, q.answer_count, q.create_time, q.last_answer_time, u.username, u.avatar AS user_avatar, c.title AS course_name FROM questions q LEFT JOIN users u ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN courses c ON q.course_id = c.id WHERE q.id = #{questionId}

SELECT a.id, a.question_id, a.user_id, u.username, u.avatar, a.content, a.is_accepted, a.like_count, a.create_time, CASE WHEN al.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_liked FROM answers a LEFT JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN answer_likes al ON a.id = al.answer_id AND al.user_id = #{userId} WHERE a.question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY a.is_accepted DESC, a.like_count DESC, a.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions (title, content, user_id, course_id, view_count, answer_count, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, 0, 0, NOW())
INSERT INTO answers (question_id, user_id, content, is_accepted, like_count, create_time) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE questions SET answer_count = answer_count + 1, last_answer_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO answer_likes (answer_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{answerId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM answer_likes WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM answer_likes WHERE answer_id = #{answerId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM questions WHERE id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM answers WHERE id = #{answerId}
